statusLine.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".workspace.current_dir // .cwd // \"\""); used_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".context_window.used_percentage // empty"); prompt=$(cd "$dir" 2>/dev/null && starship prompt --status=0 2>/dev/null); ESC=$(printf "\033"); prompt=$(printf "%s" "$prompt" | sed "s/%{//g; s/%}//g" | sed "s/${ESC}\[[0-9;]*m//g" | tr "\n" " " | sed "s/[[:space:]]*\$//" | sed "s/[\$❯][[:space:]]*\$//"); if [ -n "$used_pct" ]; then ctx=$(printf "%.0f" "$used_pct"); prompt="${prompt} ctx:${ctx}%"; fi; printf "%s" "$prompt"'

hooks.command:
command -v vale >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; t=$(jq -r '[.tool_input.content,.tool_input.text,.tool_input.html,.tool_input.markdown,.tool_input.new_str,.tool_input.description,.tool_input.body,.tool_input.title,.tool_input.name,(.tool_input.pages[]?|.content),(.tool_input.content_updates[]?|.new_str)]|map(select(type=="string" and .!=""))|.[]' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$t" ] || exit 0; o=$(printf '%s
' "$t" | vale --ext=.md) || { printf 'Vale blocked this MCP write: outgoing content violates a CustomBans rule. Fix the tool arguments and retry.
%s
' "$o" >&2; exit 2; }
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath'); case "$f" in *.py) uvx ruff check --quiet --output-format=concise "$f" 1>&2 || exit 2 ;; esac
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath'); case "$f" in *.md|*.txt) command -v vale >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; vale "$f" 1>&2 || exit 2 ;; esac
